title: distegia involucrata var. humilis
intro: Distegia involucrata var. humilis, also known as dwarf distegia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Distegia involucrata var. humilis include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. Distegia involucrata var. humilis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
